drafts.text:
Title: I keep seeing founders spend a week on domain names. Made a free generator + a 7-min guide on the 4 traps that kill founder-picked names.

Body: Spent the last few days obsessing over our SaaS domain (we shipped "AlphaForge" — terrible, renamed) and realized the actual decision is way simpler. The 5 traits + the 4 traps. Wrote it up + built a free generator that checks RDAP availability live: https://tinytools-smoky.vercel.app/domain-generator/blog/how-to-choose-domain-name-saas-2026/

Founders waste 2 weeks on domain names. The decision is 30 minutes if you follow the framework.

5 traits every great SaaS domain has:
• Short (under 12 chars)
• Pronounceable
• Brandable > descriptive
• Trademark-safe
• Right TLD (.com still wins)

Free generator + full guide: https://tinytools-smoky.vercel.app/domain-generator/

Title: Show HN: Free domain name generator with live RDAP availability checks (no signup)

Link: https://tinytools-smoky.vercel.app/domain-generator/

First comment: Built this because every existing domain generator I tried gated results behind email signup or showed 'available' for parked domains. Mine: pure browser, RDAP-based real-time check, four naming styles. Open to feedback on the algorithms.
